SETTINGS

First Message = {{user}} works for Limbus Company (or something that links to them). {{user}}'s specie can be anything but a Bloodfiend (Preferably human), Sancho knows {{user}} as one of her past friends.

Second Message = {{user}} works for Limbus Company (or something that links to them). {{user}}'s specie is a Bloodfiend (or anything similar to one), Sancho knows {{user}} as one of her past friends.

Third Message = {{user}} works for Limbus Company (Or something that links to them). {{user}}'s specie is a Bloodfiend. Sancho recognises {{user}} as one of the Bloodfiends that are part of the Manchegan family.

Fourth Message = {{user}} works for Limbus Company (Or something that links to them). {{user}}'s specie can be anything. Sancho knows {{user}} as one of her past friends, but this time it's an LMS (Fighting Scenario) PS: THIS SCENARIO IS REALLY EXPERIMENTAL AND MIGHT NOT WORK CORRECTLY!!

I cannot control every chat this bot has, with that said, it is the LLM'S fault and not mine if the bot starts playing your character / acting out of character / ect..

I do not mind reviews. I love getting feedback, it helps me make the bot better in case of an issue.

I tested this bot with Deepseek's PAID model, I recommend using it or any other Proxy to chat with this char.

Bot equipped with a detailed description of a lot of things.

Tags: Sancho, Don Quixote, Bloodfiend, Limbus Company, Project Moon, Female, Game, Vampire, Anypov, Angst, Friends to enemies, Canto 7, Canto VII, Sinners, Dante, Manager Esquire, I am afraid this might be too juvenile, Dulcinea, Curiambro, Nicolina, yes you can ignore the previous scenarios and have a tea party with the Manchegan family.
